description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, modern commercial building with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features a large, horizontally-oriented window section divided into three glass panels by black metal frames, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the store. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, with a concrete or stone base running along the bottom edge for added durability and contrast. No signage, advertisements, or decorative elements are visible on the facade, giving it a simple and functional appearance. The sides and rear of the building are solid and unadorned, with no windows or doors visible. The overall design emphasizes practicality and straightforwardness, typical of contemporary urban hardware stores.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with a large front window section framed in black metal and a minimalist white facade. The building has a flat roof and a concrete base, with no visible signage or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows a wide, three-panel glass window framed in black metal, set in a white wall with a concrete base.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a plain, solid white wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the building's boxy shape.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front in structure but lacks any windows or features, presenting a blank white wall with a concrete base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is identical to the first side, showing a featureless white wall and the concrete base.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a large, three-panel window section at the front, framed in black metal, with a concrete base and smooth white walls. No entrances, signage, or display areas are visible, and the sides and rear are plain.
